title: Garlicky Irish Potato Bake
description: A hearty, garlicky Irish dish featuring ginger cordial, perfect for a hangover cure, baked in a terracotta dish. This sugar-free-friendly recipe is a great option for a comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and minced garlic.
In a small bowl, whisk together the ginger cordial and olive oil.
Pour the ginger cordial mixture over the potatoes and garlic, tossing to coat.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a terracotta dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Sprinkle a third of the grated cheddar cheese over the potatoes.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top layer of cheese.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
